entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A very important pulse crop targeted for genomic resource development and improvement to achieve pulse sufficiency.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA GENOMICS INITIATIVE
entities.description: The first major initiative that delivered molecular markers, mapping populations, and transcriptome assemblies for pigeonpea.

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: The organization that supported the Pigeonpea Genomics Initiative.

entities.name: INDO-US AGRICULTURE KNOWLEDGE INITIATIVE
entities.description: The framework under which the Indian Council of Agricultural Research supported the Pigeonpea Genomics Initiative.

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic tools delivered in large numbers by the Pigeonpea Genomics Initiative.

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations delivered by the Pigeonpea Genomics Initiative for trait evaluation.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ASSEMBLIES
entities.description: The first set of transcriptome assemblies delivered by the Pigeonpea Genomics Initiative.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL INITIATIVE FOR PIGEONPEA GENOMICS
entities.description: A consortium that delivered draft genome assemblies for the Asha variety.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The organization that led the International Initiative for Pigeonpea Genomics.

entities.name: NATIONAL RESEARCH CENTRE ON PLANT BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: An organization that delivered draft genome assemblies for the Asha variety.

entities.name: DRAFT GENOME ASSEMBLIES
entities.description: Genomic sequences produced for the Asha variety of pigeonpea.

entities.name: ASHA
entities.description: A specific variety of pigeonpea (ICPL 87119) used for draft genome assembly.

entities.name: MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The government body in India that approved the proposal for pigeonpea improvement.

entities.name: UNITED STATES AGENCY FOR INTERNATIONAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The agency that approved the proposal for pigeonpea improvement in India.

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The government body in India that funded additional projects for pigeonpea genomics.

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-density genotyping platform established for pigeonpea.

entities.name: AXIOM CAJANUSSNP ARRAY
entities.description: A high-density genotyping platform used for pigeonpea.

entities.name: HAPMAP
entities.description: The first generation genetic map produced for pigeonpea.

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to generate data for over 400 pigeonpea lines.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATION
entities.description: The established relationship between genetic markers and desired traits in pigeonpea.

entities.name: MULTI-PARENT ADVANCE GENERATION INTER-CROSS
entities.description: A type of population being developed for pigeonpea improvement.

entities.name: NESTED ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A type of population being developed for pigeonpea improvement.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: The application of genomics information to improve pigeonpea lines.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: The geographical areas where improved pigeonpea lines are intended to be deployed for poor farmers.

relationships.source: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
NATIONAL RESEARCH CENTRE ON PLANT BIOTECHNOLOGY
UNITED STATES AGENCY FOR INTERNATIONAL DEVELOPMENT
